texto: Real confidence has a realistic view of itself. It knows what it is capable of and not capable of. Real confidence does not need to overcompensate for anything, it doesn’t have to try harder to be more than what it already is. Real confidence does not beat itself up when it makes a mistake. Real confidence is secure enough to let someone else take the credit for something, without losing its own identity. Real confidence is humble. Real confidence recognizes its weaknesses and limitations, and is secure enough to admit when it is wrong."'Living With Confidence: From Fear To Love
explicacao: Orientação direta de Dan Pedersen sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Real confidence has a realistic view of itself. It knows what it is capable of and not capable of…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, confidence, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao.

texto: Everything in the seen world is a dim reflection or representation of the unseen world.
explicacao: Citação de Dan Pedersen sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Everything in the seen world is a dim reflection or representation of the unseen world.” articula motivacao, inspiracional, metaphysics em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e metaphysics.
